creator: buchanon@mlss15.cl.msu.edu
text:
I noticed after I deinstalled the older version and installed
	the newer version that I was getting alot of these types of 
	messages in /ver/log/messages:
	MANETHEREN /KERNEL: PROC: TABLE IS FULL
	MANETHEREN LAST MESSAGE REPEATED XXXX TIMES

How-To-Repeat: 
	Run WMMail configured to point at the local mail spool.
	Then type ps.  You seem QUITE a few WMMail processes in the
	output.
